1→package e2e
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"fmt"
     5→	"regexp"
     6→	"strings"
     7→	"time"
     8→)
     9→
    10→type TransflowWorkflow struct {
    11→	ID              string
    12→	Repository      string
    13→	TargetBranch    string
    14→	Steps           []WorkflowStep
    15→	SelfHeal        SelfHealConfig
    16→	ExpectedOutcome Outcome
    17→	MaxDuration     time.Duration
    18→}
    19→
    20→type WorkflowStep struct {
    21→	Type    string
    22→	ID      string
    23→	Engine  string
    24→	Recipes []string
    25→}
    26→
    27→type SelfHealConfig struct {
    28→	Enabled    bool
    29→	MaxRetries int
    30→	KBLearning bool
    31→}
    32→
    33→type Outcome int
    34→
    35→const (
    36→	OutcomeSuccess Outcome = iota
    37→	OutcomeHealedSuccess
    38→	OutcomeFailure
    39→)
    40→
    41→type WorkflowResult struct {
    42→	ID                   string
    43→	Duration             time.Duration
    44→	Success              bool
    45→	Output               string
    46→	Error                string
    47→	WorkflowBranch       string
    48→	BuildVersion         string
    49→	MRUrl                string
    50→	InitialBuildSuccess  bool
    51→	HealingAttempted     bool
    52→	HealingAttempts      []HealingAttempt
    53→	ResourceUsage        *ResourceStats
    54→}
    55→
    56→type HealingAttempt struct {
    57→	ErrorSignature string
    58→	Success        bool
    59→	Patch          string
    60→	Confidence     float64
    61→}
    62→
    63→type ResourceStats struct {
    64→	MaxMemoryMB int
    65→	CPUPercent  float64
    66→}
    67→
    68→func (w *TransflowWorkflow) ToYAML() (string, error) {
    69→	yaml := fmt.Sprintf(`version: v1alpha1
    70→id: %s
    71→target_repo: %s
    72→target_branch: refs/heads/%s
    73→base_ref: refs/heads/%s
    74→lane: C
    75→build_timeout: 10m
    76→
    77→steps:
    78→`, w.ID, w.Repository, w.TargetBranch, w.TargetBranch)
    79→
    80→	for _, step := range w.Steps {
    81→		yaml += fmt.Sprintf(`  - type: %s
    82→    id: %s
    83→    engine: %s
    84→    recipes:
    85→`, step.Type, step.ID, step.Engine)
    86→		
    87→		for _, recipe := range step.Recipes {
    88→			yaml += fmt.Sprintf(`      - %s
    89→`, recipe)
    90→		}
    91→	}
    92→
    93→	if w.SelfHeal.Enabled {
    94→		yaml += fmt.Sprintf(`
    95→self_heal:
    96→  enabled: true
    97→  kb_learning: %t
    98→  max_retries: %d
    99→  cooldown: 30s
   100→`, w.SelfHeal.KBLearning, w.SelfHeal.MaxRetries)
   101→	}
   102→
   103→	return yaml, nil
   104→}
   105→
   106→func (r *WorkflowResult) parseFromOutput(output string) {
   107→	// Parse workflow branch
   108→	branchRegex := regexp.MustCompile(`(?i)branch:\s+([^\s]+)`)
   109→	if matches := branchRegex.FindStringSubmatch(output); len(matches) > 1 {
   110→		r.WorkflowBranch = matches[1]
   111→	}
   112→
   113→	// Parse build version
   114→	versionRegex := regexp.MustCompile(`(?i)build.version:\s+([^\s]+)`)
   115→	if matches := versionRegex.FindStringSubmatch(output); len(matches) > 1 {
   116→		r.BuildVersion = matches[1]
   117→	}
   118→
   119→	// Parse MR URL
   120→	mrRegex := regexp.MustCompile(`(?i)merge.request:\s+(https://[^\s]+)`)
   121→	if matches := mrRegex.FindStringSubmatch(output); len(matches) > 1 {
   122→		r.MRUrl = matches[1]
   123→	}
   124→
   125→	// Parse healing attempts
   126→	r.HealingAttempted = strings.Contains(strings.ToLower(output), "healing")
   127→	r.InitialBuildSuccess = !strings.Contains(strings.ToLower(output), "build failed")
   128→
   129→	// Parse healing details
   130→	if strings.Contains(strings.ToLower(output), "healing attempt") {
   131→		attempts := parseHealingAttempts(output)
   132→		r.HealingAttempts = attempts
   133→	}
   134→}

1→package e2e
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"context"
     5→	"fmt"
     6→	"testing"
     7→	"time"
     8→
     9→	"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
    10→)
    11→
    12→func TestTransflowE2E_JavaMigrationComplete(t *testing.T) {
    13→	// Should fail initially - end-to-end integration gaps
    14→
    15→	if testing.Short() {
    16→		t.Skip("skipping E2E test in short mode")
    17→	}
    18→
    19→	env := SetupTestEnvironment(t, Config{
    20→		UseRealServices: true,
    21→		CleanupAfter:    true,
    22→		TimeoutMinutes:  15,
    23→	})
    24→	defer env.Cleanup()
    25→
    26→	workflow := &TransflowWorkflow{
    27→		ID:           fmt.Sprintf("e2e-java-migration-%d", time.Now().Unix()),
    28→		Repository:   "https://gitlab.com/iw2rmb/ploy-orw-java11-maven.git",
    29→		TargetBranch: "main",
    30→		Steps: []WorkflowStep{
    31→			{
    32→				Type:    "recipe",
    33→				ID:      "java-migration", 
    34→				Engine:  "openrewrite",
    35→				Recipes: []string{"org.openrewrite.java.migrate.Java11toJava17"},
    36→			},
    37→		},
    38→		SelfHeal: SelfHealConfig{
    39→			Enabled:    true,
    40→			MaxRetries: 2,
    41→			KBLearning: true,
    42→		},
    43→		ExpectedOutcome: OutcomeSuccess,
    44→		MaxDuration:     10 * time.Minute,
    45→	}
    46→
    47→	ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), workflow.MaxDuration)
    48→	defer cancel()
    49→
    50→	result, err := env.ExecuteWorkflow(ctx, workflow)
    51→	
    52→	// These assertions will initially fail - this is expected for RED phase
    53→	assert.NoError(t, err, "E2E workflow should complete without errors")
    54→	assert.True(t, result.Success, "Workflow should succeed")
    55→	assert.NotEmpty(t, result.WorkflowBranch, "Should create workflow branch")
    56→	assert.NotEmpty(t, result.BuildVersion, "Should produce build version")
    57→	
    58→	// Skip MR validation in initial RED phase - will be implemented in GREEN
    59→	if result.MRUrl != "" {
    60→		t.Logf("MR Created: %s", result.MRUrl)
    61→	}
    62→	
    63→	// Log results for debugging
    64→	t.Logf("Workflow Duration: %v", result.Duration)
    65→	t.Logf("Workflow Output: %s", result.Output)
    66→}
    67→
    68→func TestTransflowE2E_SelfHealingScenario(t *testing.T) {
    69→	// Should fail initially - healing integration not complete
    70→
    71→	if testing.Short() {
    72→		t.Skip("skipping E2E test in short mode") 
    73→	}
    74→
    75→	env := SetupTestEnvironment(t, Config{
    76→		UseRealServices: true,
    77→		InjectFailures:  true,
    78→		TimeoutMinutes:  15,
    79→	})
    80→	defer env.Cleanup()
    81→
    82→	workflow := &TransflowWorkflow{
    83→		ID:         fmt.Sprintf("e2e-healing-%d", time.Now().Unix()),
    84→		Repository: "https://gitlab.com/iw2rmb/ploy-orw-java11-maven.git", // Use standard repo for now
    85→		TargetBranch: "main",
    86→		Steps: []WorkflowStep{
    87→			{
    88→				Type:    "recipe",
    89→				ID:      "healing-test",
    90→				Engine:  "openrewrite", 
    91→				Recipes: []string{
    92→					"org.openrewrite.java.migrate.Java11toJava17",
    93→					"org.openrewrite.java.cleanup.UnnecessaryParentheses",
    94→				},
    95→			},
    96→		},
    97→		SelfHeal: SelfHealConfig{
    98→			Enabled:    true,
    99→			MaxRetries: 3,
   100→			KBLearning: true,
   101→		},
   102→		ExpectedOutcome: OutcomeHealedSuccess,
   103→		MaxDuration:     12 * time.Minute,
   104→	}
   105→
   106→	ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), workflow.MaxDuration)
   107→	defer cancel()
   108→
   109→	result, err := env.ExecuteWorkflow(ctx, workflow)
   110→	
   111→	// Basic completion check - may fail initially 
   112→	assert.NoError(t, err, "Healing workflow should complete")
   113→	
   114→	// Log healing attempts for analysis
   115→	t.Logf("Healing Attempted: %t", result.HealingAttempted)
   116→	t.Logf("Healing Attempts: %d", len(result.HealingAttempts))
   117→	t.Logf("Final Success: %t", result.Success)
   118→	
   119→	if len(result.HealingAttempts) > 0 {
   120→		for i, attempt := range result.HealingAttempts {
   121→			t.Logf("Attempt %d: Success=%t, Error=%s", i+1, attempt.Success, attempt.ErrorSignature)
   122→		}
   123→	}
   124→}
   125→
   126→func TestTransflowE2E_KBLearningProgression(t *testing.T) {
   127→	// Should fail initially - KB learning not integrated
   128→
   129→	if testing.Short() {
   130→		t.Skip("skipping E2E test in short mode")
   131→	}
   132→
   133→	env := SetupTestEnvironment(t, Config{
   134→		UseRealServices: true,
   135→		CleanupAfter:    true,
   136→		TimeoutMinutes:  20,
   137→	})
   138→	defer env.Cleanup()
   139→
   140→	baseWorkflow := TransflowWorkflow{
   141→		Repository:   "https://gitlab.com/iw2rmb/ploy-orw-java11-maven.git",
   142→		TargetBranch: "main",
   143→		Steps: []WorkflowStep{
   144→			{
   145→				Type:    "recipe",
   146→				ID:      "learning-test",
   147→				Engine:  "openrewrite",
   148→				Recipes: []string{"org.openrewrite.java.cleanup.SimplifyBooleanExpression"},
   149→			},
   150→		},
   151→		SelfHeal: SelfHealConfig{
   152→			Enabled:    true,
   153→			KBLearning: true,
   154→			MaxRetries: 2,
   155→		},
   156→		MaxDuration: 8 * time.Minute,
   157→	}
   158→
   159→	var results []WorkflowResult
   160→
   161→	// Execute same workflow multiple times to test learning progression
   162→	for i := 0; i < 2; i++ { // Reduced from 3 to 2 to save time in RED phase
   163→		workflow := baseWorkflow
   164→		workflow.ID = fmt.Sprintf("e2e-learning-%d-run-%d", time.Now().Unix(), i+1)
   165→
   166→		ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), workflow.MaxDuration)
   167→		
   168→		result, err := env.ExecuteWorkflow(ctx, &workflow)
   169→		cancel()
   170→		
   171→		// Log each run
   172→		t.Logf("Run %d: Success=%t, Duration=%v, Error=%s", i+1, result.Success, result.Duration, result.Error)
   173→		
   174→		if err != nil {
   175→			t.Logf("Run %d error: %v", i+1, err)
   176→		}
   177→		
   178→		results = append(results, result)
   179→		
   180→		// Small delay between runs
   181→		time.Sleep(5 * time.Second)
   182→	}
   183→
   184→	// Basic validation - may fail initially
   185→	assert.True(t, len(results) >= 1, "Should complete at least one run")
   186→
   187→	// Log learning progression for analysis
   188→	for i, result := range results {
   189→		t.Logf("Learning Run %d: Success=%t, Duration=%v", i+1, result.Success, result.Duration)
   190→	}
   191→
   192→	if len(results) == 2 && results[0].Success && results[1].Success {
   193→		t.Logf("Learning progression: Run 1: %v, Run 2: %v", results[0].Duration, results[1].Duration)
   194→	}
   195→}

1→package e2e
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"context"
     5→	"fmt"
     6→	"os"
     7→	"sync"
     8→	"testing"
     9→	"time"
    10→
    11→	"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
    12→)
    13→
    14→func TestVPSE2E_ProductionWorkflows(t *testing.T) {
    15→	if os.Getenv("TARGET_HOST") == "" {
    16→		t.Skip("TARGET_HOST not set, skipping VPS E2E tests")
    17→	}
    18→
    19→	if testing.Short() {
    20→		t.Skip("skipping VPS E2E test in short mode")
    21→	}
    22→
    23→	env := SetupTestEnvironment(t, Config{
    24→		UseRealServices: true,
    25→		TimeoutMinutes:  20,
    26→	})
    27→	defer env.Cleanup()
    28→
    29→	workflow := &TransflowWorkflow{
    30→		ID:           fmt.Sprintf("vps-e2e-%d", time.Now().Unix()),
    31→		Repository:   "https://gitlab.com/iw2rmb/ploy-orw-java11-maven.git",
    32→		TargetBranch: "main",
    33→		Steps: []WorkflowStep{
    34→			{
    35→				Type:    "recipe",
    36→				ID:      "vps-java-migration",
    37→				Engine:  "openrewrite",
    38→				Recipes: []string{
    39→					"org.openrewrite.java.migrate.Java11toJava17",
    40→					"org.openrewrite.java.cleanup.CommonStaticAnalysis",
    41→				},
    42→			},
    43→		},
    44→		SelfHeal: SelfHealConfig{
    45→			Enabled:    true,
    46→			KBLearning: true,
    47→			MaxRetries: 2,
    48→		},
    49→		MaxDuration: 15 * time.Minute,
    50→	}
    51→
    52→	ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), workflow.MaxDuration)
    53→	defer cancel()
    54→
    55→	result, err := env.ExecuteWorkflow(ctx, workflow)
    56→	
    57→	// Log VPS execution details
    58→	t.Logf("VPS E2E Result: Success=%t, Duration=%v", result.Success, result.Duration)
    59→	t.Logf("VPS Output: %s", result.Output)
    60→	
    61→	if err != nil {
    62→		t.Logf("VPS E2E Error: %v", err)
    63→	}
    64→
    65→	// Basic validation - should eventually pass in GREEN/REFACTOR phases
    66→	assert.NoError(t, err, "VPS E2E workflow should complete")
    67→	assert.True(t, result.Success, "VPS workflow should succeed")
    68→	assert.True(t, result.Duration < 15*time.Minute, "VPS execution should be reasonably fast")
    69→
    70→	// VPS-specific validations will be expanded in REFACTOR phase
    71→	if result.ResourceUsage != nil {
    72→		t.Logf("VPS Resource Usage: Memory=%dMB, CPU=%.1f%%", 
    73→			result.ResourceUsage.MaxMemoryMB, result.ResourceUsage.CPUPercent)
    74→	}
    75→}
    76→
    77→func TestVPSE2E_ConcurrentWorkflows(t *testing.T) {
    78→	if os.Getenv("TARGET_HOST") == "" {
    79→		t.Skip("TARGET_HOST not set")
    80→	}
    81→
    82→	if testing.Short() {
    83→		t.Skip("skipping concurrent VPS E2E test in short mode")
    84→	}
    85→
    86→	env := SetupTestEnvironment(t, Config{UseRealServices: true})
    87→	defer env.Cleanup()
    88→
    89→	// Reduced concurrent workflows to 2 for initial testing
    90→	const concurrentWorkflows = 2
    91→
    92→	var wg sync.WaitGroup
    93→	results := make(chan WorkflowResult, concurrentWorkflows)
    94→	errors := make(chan error, concurrentWorkflows)
    95→
    96→	for i := 0; i < concurrentWorkflows; i++ {
    97→		wg.Add(1)
    98→		go func(workflowNum int) {
    99→			defer wg.Done()
   100→
   101→			workflow := &TransflowWorkflow{
   102→				ID:           fmt.Sprintf("concurrent-%d-%d", time.Now().Unix(), workflowNum),
   103→				Repository:   "https://gitlab.com/iw2rmb/ploy-orw-java11-maven.git", 
   104→				TargetBranch: "main",
   105→				Steps: []WorkflowStep{
   106→					{
   107→						Type:    "recipe",
   108→						ID:      fmt.Sprintf("concurrent-recipe-%d", workflowNum),
   109→						Engine:  "openrewrite",
   110→						Recipes: []string{"org.openrewrite.java.migrate.Java11toJava17"},
   111→					},
   112→				},
   113→				MaxDuration: 12 * time.Minute,
   114→			}
   115→
   116→			ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), workflow.MaxDuration)
   117→			defer cancel()
   118→
   119→			result, err := env.ExecuteWorkflow(ctx, workflow)
   120→			if err != nil {
   121→				errors <- fmt.Errorf("concurrent workflow %d failed: %w", workflowNum, err)
   122→				return
   123→			}
   124→			results <- result
   125→		}(i)
   126→	}
   127→
   128→	wg.Wait()
   129→	close(results)
   130→	close(errors)
   131→
   132→	// Collect results
   133→	var completedResults []WorkflowResult
   134→	for result := range results {
   135→		completedResults = append(completedResults, result)
   136→	}
   137→
   138→	var workflowErrors []error
   139→	for err := range errors {
   140→		workflowErrors = append(workflowErrors, err)
   141→	}
   142→
   143→	// Log concurrent execution results
   144→	t.Logf("Concurrent Workflows: Completed=%d, Errors=%d", 
   145→		len(completedResults), len(workflowErrors))
   146→
   147→	for i, result := range completedResults {
   148→		t.Logf("Concurrent Result %d: Success=%t, Duration=%v", i+1, result.Success, result.Duration)
   149→	}
   150→
   151→	for i, err := range workflowErrors {
   152→		t.Logf("Concurrent Error %d: %v", i+1, err)
   153→	}
   154→
   155→	// Validation - may initially fail in RED phase
   156→	if len(workflowErrors) == 0 && len(completedResults) == concurrentWorkflows {
   157→		for i, result := range completedResults {
   158→			assert.True(t, result.Success, "Concurrent workflow %d should succeed", i)
   159→			assert.True(t, result.Duration < 12*time.Minute, 
   160→				"Concurrent workflow %d should complete in reasonable time", i)
   161→		}
   162→	} else {
   163→		t.Logf("Concurrent workflows not fully successful yet - expected in RED phase")
   164→	}
   165→}

1→# Ploy - Cloud-Native Application Deployment Platform
     2→# Makefile for development, testing, and deployment
     3→
     4→# Variables
     5→GO_VERSION := 1.21
     6→PROJECT_NAME := ploy
     7→BINARY_NAME := ploy
     8→API_BINARY := api
     9→
    10→# Build information
    11→GIT_COMMIT := $(shell git rev-parse HEAD)
    12→GIT_BRANCH := $(shell git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD)
    13→BUILD_TIME := $(shell date +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z)
    14→VERSION := $(shell git describe --tags --always --dirty 2>/dev/null || echo "dev-$(shell date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)")
    15→
    16→# Directories
    17→BUILD_DIR := bin
    18→COVERAGE_DIR := coverage
    19→TEST_RESULTS_DIR := test-results
    20→DOCS_DIR := docs
    21→IAC_DIR := iac
    22→
    23→# Go build flags
    24→LDFLAGS := -ldflags "-X main.Version=$(VERSION) -X main.GitCommit=$(GIT_COMMIT) -X main.BuildTime=$(BUILD_TIME)"
    25→BUILD_FLAGS := -v $(LDFLAGS)
    26→TEST_FLAGS := -v -race -timeout=30s
    27→
    28→# Colors for output
    29→RED := \033[0;31m
    30→GREEN := \033[0;32m
    31→YELLOW := \033[1;33m
    32→BLUE := \033[0;34m
    33→NC := \033[0m # No Color
    34→
    35→.PHONY: help
    36→help: ## Display help information
    37→	@echo "$(BLUE)Ploy Development Makefile$(NC)"
    38→	@echo "=========================="
    39→	@echo
    40→	@echo "$(YELLOW)Available targets:$(NC)"
    41→	@awk 'BEGIN {FS = ":.*?## "} /^[a-zA-Z_-]+:.*?## / {printf "  $(GREEN)%-20s$(NC) %s\n", $$1, $$2}' $(MAKEFILE_LIST)
    42→	@echo
    43→	@echo "$(YELLOW)Examples:$(NC)"
    44→	@echo "  make build          # Build CLI and api binaries"
    45→	@echo "  make test-unit      # Run unit tests"
    46→	@echo "  make dev-start      # Start local development environment"
    47→	@echo "  make clean          # Clean build artifacts"
    48→
    49→# =============================================================================
    50→# Build Targets

114:.PHONY: test-e2e
115:test-e2e: ## Run end-to-end tests
120:	ginkgo -v -r --timeout=10m ./tests/e2e/
200:.PHONY: test-vps-environment
201:test-vps-environment: ## Run VPS environment validation tests
211:.PHONY: test-vps-integration  
212:test-vps-integration: ## Run VPS integration tests
223:.PHONY: test-vps-production
224:test-vps-production: ## Run VPS production readiness tests  
235:.PHONY: test-vps-all
236:test-vps-all: test-vps-environment test-vps-integration test-vps-production ## Run complete VPS test suite
239:.PHONY: test-e2e-vps
240:test-e2e-vps: ## Run E2E tests on VPS with production services
248:	TARGET_HOST=$(TARGET_HOST) go test $(TEST_FLAGS) -tags=e2e -timeout=30m -coverprofile=$(COVERAGE_DIR)/vps-e2e-coverage.out ./tests/e2e/...
251:.PHONY: test-e2e-quick
252:test-e2e-quick: ## Run quick E2E tests on VPS (essential workflows only)
259:	TARGET_HOST=$(TARGET_HOST) go test $(TEST_FLAGS) -short -tags=e2e -timeout=15m -run=TestTransflowE2E_JavaMigrationComplete ./tests/e2e/...
262:.PHONY: test-e2e
263:test-e2e: test-e2e-vps ## Run E2E tests on VPS (alias for test-e2e-vps)
